mapper.select:
SELECT ur.RESERV_ID, ur.REVIEW AS USER_REVIEW, ur.REVIEW_PICTURE, TO_CHAR(ur.CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS USER_REVIEW_DATE, ur.RATING, ur.STATUS,
r.USER_ID, u.NAME AS USER_NAME, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(r.RESERV_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS RESERV_TIME,
cr.REVIEW AS CEO_REVIEW, TO_CHAR(cr.CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS CEO_REVIEW_DATE FROM USER_REVIEW ur INNER JOIN RESERVATION r ON ur.RESERV_ID = r.RESERV_ID INNER JOIN USERS u ON r.USER_ID = u.USER_ID LEFT JOIN MEMBER m ON r.USER_ID = m.USER_ID LEFT JOIN CEO_REVIEW cr ON ur.RESERV_ID = cr.RESERV_ID WHERE r.STORE_ID = #{value} AND ur.STATUS = '정상' ORDER BY ur.CREATE_DATE DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CEO_REVIEW ( RESERV_ID, REVIEW, CREATE_DATE ) VALUES ( #{reservId}, #{review}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE CEO_REVIEW SET REVIEW = #{review}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE RESERV_ID = #{reservId}
